# Origin

> Origin is local-first memory for AI work. Hybrid retrieval (93.6% Recall@5 on LongMemEval oracle, 70.0% on LoCoMo), real git versioning of every memory write in ~/.origin/.git/, mandatory provenance on distilled wiki pages, and one daemon serving Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Claude Desktop, Gemini CLI, and other MCP-compatible AI tools. Cross-platform on macOS (arm64, x64), Linux (x86_64, aarch64; glibc), and Windows (x86_64). Apache-2.0. Source at github.com/7xuanlu/origin.

## Core

- [Origin homepage](https://useorigin.app/): What Origin is, who it is for, how it differs from cloud memory layers.
- [About](https://useorigin.app/about): Project background and the person behind Origin.
- [Get started](https://useorigin.app/docs/get-started): Install the Claude Code plugin or run Origin setup for another MCP client, then verify the first memory round trip locally.
- [Daily workflow](https://useorigin.app/docs/daily-workflow): Capture, handoff, distill. The session loop that makes AI work compound across days.
- [Core concepts](https://useorigin.app/docs/core-concepts): Memories, pages, entities, sessions, sources. The vocabulary the daemon enforces.

## Concepts

- [AI work memory](https://useorigin.app/learn/ai-work-memory): What changes when AI sessions can carry context across tools and weeks.
- [MCP memory server](https://useorigin.app/learn/mcp-memory-server): How Origin exposes memory through the Model Context Protocol so any compatible AI client can read and write the same store.
- [Local-first AI memory](https://useorigin.app/learn/local-first-ai-memory): Data ownership, privacy, control. Why the daemon writes to ~/.origin/ instead of the cloud.
- [Markdown plus local index](https://useorigin.app/learn/markdown-local-index-ai-memory): The storage model. Markdown projection for humans, libSQL index for retrieval, both kept in sync.
- [Distilled wiki pages](https://useorigin.app/learn/distilled-wiki-pages-ai-memory): Why Origin composes atomic captures into source-backed pages with provenance and refreshable revision state.
- [Claude Code memory](https://useorigin.app/learn/claude-code-memory): How Origin works inside Claude Code sessions and how /capture and /handoff fit the work loop.
- [AI agent handoff loop](https://useorigin.app/learn/ai-agent-handoff-loop): Session-end discipline that prevents context loss between AI sessions.
- [Origin for Claude Code](https://useorigin.app/learn/origin-for-claude-code): The practical /init, /brief, /capture, /handoff, and /distill loop for Claude Code users.

## Comparisons

- [AI work memory vs knowledge base](https://useorigin.app/learn/ai-work-memory-vs-knowledge-base): Documents and notes vs session memory, handoffs, retrieval, and agent reuse.
- [Origin vs Basic Memory](https://useorigin.app/learn/origin-vs-basic-memory): Markdown knowledge base vs AI work-session memory layer. Side-by-side dimensions plus a migration note.
- [Origin vs claude-mem](https://useorigin.app/learn/origin-vs-claude-mem): Observer-style Claude Code memory vs MCP-first cross-tool memory.
- [Origin vs Superlocal Memory](https://useorigin.app/learn/origin-vs-superlocal-memory): Honest LoCoMo comparison (Superlocal currently 4.8 points ahead in zero-LLM config), a 10-second inspectability test, and a two-week parallel-trial protocol for evaluating both.

## Reference

- [Commands](https://useorigin.app/docs/commands): Origin CLI subcommands and the MCP tools the daemon exposes.
- [Data and privacy](https://useorigin.app/docs/data-and-privacy): What lives where on disk, what leaves the machine, what does not.
- [MCP clients](https://useorigin.app/docs/mcp-clients): Setup notes for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Claude Desktop, Gemini CLI, and VS Code.
- [Troubleshooting](https://useorigin.app/docs/troubleshooting): Common failure modes and the daemon repair paths.

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://useorigin.app/llms-full.txt): Long-form companion to this file. Contains the full body of every Learn article and Docs page so an LLM can ingest the full corpus in one fetch.
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/7xuanlu/origin): Source, releases, issues. Apache-2.0.
- [Origin Claude Code plugin (npm)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@7xuanlu/origin): The Claude Code plugin published from this repo.
- [origin-mcp server (npm)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/origin-mcp): The MCP server binary as a standalone npm package.
- [origin-mcp on crates.io](https://crates.io/crates/origin-mcp): The Rust crate behind origin-mcp.
- [origin-types on crates.io](https://crates.io/crates/origin-types): Shared wire types for downstream tools.
- [License](https://github.com/7xuanlu/origin/blob/main/LICENSE): Apache-2.0.
